chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 439 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** Learned AAG files compliance report together with appointment order of the petitioner, taken on record. He submits that the petitioner has joined his service; therefore, this petition has become infructuous. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner; therefore, this petition having served its purpose is hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
